reviews.review_description: This app is amazing just need tutorials to understand how to hold in walk with items also how to drink liquid or eat food as they ask me to do. Also how to out more then one item in one machine if so.

This is absolutely fantastic and loads of fun! I have so much fun messing around with the different experiments. I only wish that when you click the elements on the table, it would give you more information. But that’s all! Absolutely worth it!
